name: Joey Diaz
blurb: He built his name on the club circuit and through frequent appearances on The Joe Rogan Experience, then hosted his own podcasts The Church of Whats Happening Now and Uncle Joeys Joint.
bio: Joey CoCo Diaz is a Cuban American stand-up comedian, actor, and podcaster known for loud, profane storytelling drawn from a turbulent early life in New Jersey. He built his name on the club circuit and through frequent appearances on The Joe Rogan Experience, then hosted his own podcasts The Church of Whats Happening Now and Uncle Joeys Joint. He has acted in films and series including The Longest Yard and My Name Is Earl.

timeline.ev: Begins performing stand-up full time in Colorado
Moves to Los Angeles and starts acting in film and television
Launches The Church of Whats Happening Now podcast
Releases his first hour special, Sociably Unacceptable
Begins hosting the podcast Uncle Joeys Joint

accolades: Featured storyteller on Comedy Centrals This Is Not Happening
Host of the podcasts The Church of Whats Happening Now and Uncle Joeys Joint
Author of the memoir Tremendous: The Life of a Comedy Savage

specials.t: It's Either You or the Priest

bits.yt_title: Joey Diaz Does Heroin - This Is Not Happening - Uncensored
